title: circaea alpina subsp. angustifolia
intro: Circaea alpina subsp. angustifolia, also known as narrow-leaved enchanter's nightshade, is a plant species belonging to the evening primrose family (Onagraceae). It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antiviral properties. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, soothing digestive issues, and supporting the immune system. Circaea alpina subsp. angustifolia can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, although further research is necessary to confirm its effectiveness and safety for human consumption.
